title: lycopodium trachyloma
intro: Lycopodium trachyloma, also known as Staghorn Club Moss, is a species of club moss in the genus Lycopodium, characterized by its unique, branching stems and needle-like leaves. The medicinal properties of Lycopodium trachyloma include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it a popular remedy for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include relief from coughs, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Lycopodium trachyloma is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in homeopathic medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
